name: Improper Handling of Missing Values
description: The product does not handle or incorrectly handles when a parameter, field, or argument name is specified but the associated value is missing, empty, blank, or null. This can cause null pointer dereferences, crashes, or unexpected application states.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (parameters, form fields, API arguments) where the value may be empty or null flowing to TRANSFORM or CONTROL nodes (string operations, business logic) without a CONTROL mediator (null check, empty value validation) that verifies the value is present and non-empty before use.
